title: A New Place to Call Home

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's already this bright! Sorry, Mom, I'll head out 
to the fields right'way!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait a sec… this is…!?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: G-Good morning.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aaah?! A horsegirl! Wait, I mean… Suzuka?! 
Huh? Um, I… What?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, that's right! Yesterday, I arrived in Tokyo! 
Then I met Suzuka and we ran together! And after that…)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
After that… I was totally shocked at how big 
the academy is… then I got all dizzy…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
…Hey, Suzuka. Just wondering, but… I totally caused you 
a ton of trouble, didn't I?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Not really… I heard from the resident assistant, Fuji, that you're
my new roommate, so I figured I'd just carry you back with me…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You carried me back?! Aaaahhhh! I'm sorry — so, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, but you said we're roommates?! That makes me so happy! …But I feel super sorry too! Aaaaah!!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: U-Um… are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew… Yeah. I feel much better after washing my face! 
Sorry I made such a racket earlier, hehe…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But can you blame me? Tracen Academy is seriously amazing! 
I mean, even the dorm's washrooms are ginormous!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, well, there are two dorms, Ritto and Miho, 
both of which are divided into several buildings.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Still, there really are a lot of students. 
If we didn't have this much room, we would 
probably all be squished together…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I see! …Ah, are those bottles over there all tail-care products?!
There's so many…!!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Exactly who is making all this noise this early in the— Huh? 
…Haven't seen you around before.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ack, sorry! I-I'm Special Week!
I just transferred here yesterday…!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so you're the one… I'm Air Groove, the vice president of the
student council. I heard you collapsed earlier. Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I'm f-f-fine!! Your Excellency!!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: …I'm only a vice president.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um. Special Week, it's okay. She's actually not that scary. 
Despite how she appears…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's the most reassuring description you can muster…?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Ah, forget it. In any case, you might want to check out 
a mirror, Special Week. Your tail is still a mess.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It is?! S-Sorry, Your Grace!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I told you, I'm just the vice president… Honestly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Suzuka, can I ask you to give her a tour of the place? 
After that, show her to the student council office. 
The president will be waiting there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, sure… I can do that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I know it's a lot of walking around, 
but your leg is okay now, right?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh yeah, it's completely fine. 
I've even started training again.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? How about registering for a scrimmage, then? 
I remember seeing quite a few that lined up well with your 
recovery.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm… Um, about that…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! Wh-what?! What, what?! 
Sorry, does anyone know how to stop the dryer!?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sorry… I should go and help Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: …Understood.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay, as for our tour… this is the cafeteria here. 
They serve breakfast and dinner every day, which includes 
days off like today…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: …Ah.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Urk. Sorry, I know you're in the middle of explaining everything. But I missed dinner yesterday and can't bear the hunger anymore…!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eh… Hehe… Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, s-sorry. It's just… your belly gave you away. 
I can't… Hehehe. Hahaha…!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Haaah… Um… First off, let's grab something to eat, then.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okaaay…!
